controls.title: Secure authentication
controls.evidence_summary: bcrypt password verification is present, but the login route lacks rate limiting and production MFA/lockout evidence is not in the repository.
controls.confidence_rationale: Source evidence directly supports password hashing and the missing rate-limit gap, but production identity governance evidence was not present.
controls.evidence_quality_rationale: Evidence is partial because concrete code anchors cover only technical authentication behavior and manual access governance records remain outstanding.

findings.title: Login endpoint lacks rate limiting
findings.description: The login route calls the handler directly without throttling middleware.

evidence.assessment: No rate limiting middleware is applied before login handling.

findings.recommendation: Add per-IP and per-account login throttling.

gaps: Missing production MFA and lockout evidence
recommendations: Attach MFA policy and lockout configuration evidence
